_publications._publicationTitle: Establishment of immortalized murine mesothelial cells and a novel mesothelioma cell line.

_contextSnippet: All cells (primary, immortalized) of mesothelial origin were clearly positive for mesothelin, a mesothelial cell-specific marker. The single positive band on the Western blots had a relative molecular mass (Mr) of 69 kDa corresponding to the mesothelin precursor protein
details: Antibody detected a single positive band at 69 kDa corresponding to the mesothelin precursor protein in all mesothelial cells
